name: YAPP2: Yet Another Pushing Puzzler
detailed_description:
As the title says, it is yet another pushing puzzler, in which you have to push boxes onto specific locations.
What makes this game unique is: It's 3d.

FEATURES:

Yet another 3d pushing puzzler.

6 worlds, each with a different theme.
54 handcrafted levels, full of "Ah-ha" moments.
And, awful artwork.

About YAPP series

YAPP2: Yet Another Pushing Puzzler is the second game of YAPP series. (A series of games with awful artwork, weird mechanisms, challenging puzzles, and the same initials.)
The first one was:
